description:
New file: cmd/bw/version_check.go

Implement the core check logic:
- Read cache from ~/.cache/bw/version-check.json (lastCheck timestamp + latestVersion)
- If lastCheck < 24h ago, skip entirely (return cached latestVersion or nothing)
- Otherwise, write the timestamp unconditionally (before or after the API call — either way, a failure means we tried today)
- Call the GitHub releases API (same endpoint as bw upgrade)
- On success, store latestVersion in cache
- On failure (network error, timeout, non-200), just return — no retry, no error surfaced
- Compare latestVersion to current binary version; return the result

Use injectable dependencies (same pattern as upgrade.go) for testability.
title: Version check with cache
